meta_desc: Apartment Olive — bright duplex with private pool, terrace with garden and sea view, BBQ, fully equipped kitchen, air conditioning in all rooms, and private parking in Lovran near Opatija.
title: Olive Apartment
intro: Sunny duplex with private pool, terrace, garden, and sea view.
description: Apartment Olive offers a bright and spacious retreat in a quiet part of Lovran, just 10 minutes from the town center and the famous Lungomare promenade. With a sunny terrace and private pool overlooking Kvarner Bay, it provides modern comfort, plenty of natural light, and accommodation for up to 6 guests. Located only 100 meters from the beach and equipped with a BBQ area and private parking, Olive is perfect for both relaxing holidays and remote work by the sea.
features: 🌅 Terrace with garden and sea view
availability_note: Check the calendar below for available dates. Book early to secure your preferred stay.
inquiry_note: Send us your desired dates and we’ll reply with availability and rates.
contact_note: Interested in Apartment Olive? Send us your inquiry directly:
footer_note: Boutique apartments on the Opatija Riviera — comfort, design, and sea views.

faq.a: Check-in from 15:00, check-out by 10:00. Late check-in is available with prior notice — we use a digital security lock and send your personal PIN code before arrival.
3 free private parking spaces per apartment, directly on the property.
A 20% deposit confirms your reservation. The remaining balance is due on arrival.
Each apartment has its own private pool, exclusively for its guests. Pool water quality is tested weekly.
10-minute walk to Lovran old town, the beach, and the Lungomare promenade.
Available on request at no extra charge. Please let us know when booking.
Weber gas grill available for all guests.
Fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher, plus a washing machine.
Included. Fresh bed linen and towels are provided for all guests.
Smoking is permitted in outdoor areas only. The apartment interior is smoke-free.
Air conditioning is available in all rooms and living spaces.
